select_when: The facts exist but no governing thought exists yet.
Analysis is largely finished but prioritization and connection are not.
The audience needs linked insight rather than an evidence dump.
The real bottleneck is deciding what matters and what deserves to drive action.
avoid_when: Synthesis is being faked as compression before the underlying analysis is strong enough to support it.
A simple story is being forced by dropping details that still carry the causal spine.

curation_notes.summary: Focused on governing-thought formation and action-driving integration rather than on generic summary work.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor communication sprawl because the raw source is already strongest on turning analysis into linked conclusions.
open_questions: The source spans strategy and AI transformation layers, but the operational file stays on synthesis as a decision-enabling move.

select_when.note: The raw source is explicit on missing governing thought, post-analysis prioritization, and linked insight.

avoid_when.note: The anti-fake-synthesis warnings are reviewed normalization of the source's antagonism to evidence dumps and overcompression.

input_type.note: The compact label summarizes the raw state where many facts exist without unifying thought.

output_type.note: The output label compresses synthesis into a single governing insight artifact.

reasoning_types.note: The model integrates across systems and requires reflective prioritization.
